headline: BAE Systems advances aircraft electrification with opening of new Endicott facility
summary: BAE Systems (LON: BA) has opened the 150,000-square-foot addition to its Endicott, New York campus. The new building, first announced last year, is dedicated to the development and manufacturing of high-voltage energy storage for hybrid and all-electric aircraft and ground vehicles. The expansion increases BAE Systems' capacity to combine decades of propulsion expertise with leading-edge aviation technology.
